title: Big Data Ecosystem Technologies Flow
description: A flowchart illustrating the main technology categories and components used in a modern Big Data environment, from data ingestion to consumption.
elements: Data Consumption & Visualization Tools (e.g., Tableau, BI Apps)
relationships: Data flows from Sources through Ingestion to Storage
Processing Frameworks access data from Storage
Resource Management allocates resources for Processing
Visualization Tools consume analyzed data for business insights
